testcase.name: test_multichip_decode_geometry_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/common/work_split.cpp:98: target_num_cores <= total_available_cores info: Target number of cores 75 is greater than total testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7b243bf58ae0>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_decode_geometry_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """One-real-weight-variable-at-a-time DRAM-sharded geometry sweep."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_GEOMETRY_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_GEOMETRY_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:874: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:784: in _run_decode_policy_candidate candidate = MultiChipDecoder.from_state_dict( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1403: in from_state_dict return cls( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1223: in __init__ self.advisor_gated_output_mem_config = _advisor_width_sharded_l1( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:214: in _advisor_width_sharded_l1 core_ranges = ttnn.num_cores_to_corerangeset(cores, ttnn.CoreCoord(grid_x, grid_y), row_wise=True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
target_num_cores = 75, grid_size = 11-6, row_wise = True
def num_cores_to_corerangeset( target_num_cores: int, grid_size: ttnn.CoreCoord, row_wise: bool = False, ): """ Create a CoreRangeSet containing the specified number of cores """ > return ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.num_cores_to_corerangeset( target_num_cores, grid_size, row_wise, ) E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/common/work_split.cpp:98: target_num_cores <= total_available_cores E info: E Target number of cores 75 is greater than total number of available cores 66 E backtrace: E --- /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/ttnn/ttnn/_ttnn.so(+0x3d14f1)
